name: Al-Firya
overview: A series about the love of a young girl for an old man. The story is that a girl named Hessa, who is young, was raised by a man named Saud (Bo Mubarak), and when she grew up, she loved him, but at first he did not reciprocate her feelings and considered her as his daughter, but that changed and he married her and their lives changed forever after that marriage.
